name: Exposure of Information Through Directory Listing
description: The product exposes a directory listing that indexes all resources within a directory. Attackers can use this to discover source code files, private data, configuration files, and timestamps that facilitate further exploitation.
detection_pattern: EGRESS[web_server] node serving STORAGE[directory] contents as a listing to external users without CONTROL[directory_listing_disabled] or AUTH[access_control] mediating the response. The web server auto-indexes directory contents when no index file is present.
